question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks no didactic questions. It writes the full solution, verifies it, then explains. The user volunteered understanding at the end without being prompted.

question_quality.rationale: No questions were posed at all, so no choices or forks were surfaced for the user to engage with.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolded progression — the Pair dumped the full solution and a complete walkthrough in a single turn, eliminating any teachable buildup.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the explanation is well-organized, but it's monologue-style with no back-and-forth. The user essentially confirmed understanding alone.

effectiveness.rationale: Final code produces correct answers (Norwegian/Japanese) in 0.6 ms, comparable to baseline.

friction.rationale: Resolved in 1 turn vs baseline's 2, with similar prose volume and a clean upfront clue-mapping table. Slightly tighter than baseline.
